characters.name: Agent LaChance
characters.description: Agent LaChanceFull nameMr. LaChanceGenderMaleResides inWashington D.C.OccupationSecret Service AgentEye colorBrownHair colorBlack (graying)AffiliationsUS Secret ServiceSeason(s)Season 2Last seenGirl Meets Semi-FormalPortrayed byPhil Morris Agent LaChanceis a character inGirl Meets World. He first appears in the second season episodeGirl Meets Semi-Formal, and is played by Phil Morris. Assigned to the security detail for newly elected SenatorEric Matthews, Agent LaChance follows his protectee to New York City.  However, upon introducing himself, Eric replies by asking for an order of hummus. For the next three days, all their interactions follow the same pattern. Finally, after trailing Eric to the residence of his brother,Cory, the agent manages to explain exactly who he is, although Eric still points out he has yet to receive his hummus, and has not eaten in three days.  Later, he accompanies the Senator toTopanga's, for a meeting with a representative of a company with a questionable environmental record, who ultimately turns out to be Eric's best friend from college,Jack Hunter. Agent LaChance subsequently, shadows the pair to the Semi-Formal Dance atJohn Quincy Adams Middle School, where Eric thanks his "niche" and her friends for supporting his campaign by arranging to have the band,Sheppardmake a special performance.

characters.name: Alterna-History Class
characters.description: Alterna-History ClassTeacherAlterna-CoryLocationJohn Quincy Adams Middle SchoolRoom Number25Seen InGirl Meets GravityThe"Alterna-History Class"was the History classRiley and Mayatransfer into to avoid havingCory Matthewsas their teacher during their first day of Eighth Grade atJohn Quincy Adams Middle School. Although (due to the impatience of the teacher for their antics of attempting to sit together) their stay is brief, the girls cannot help but notice that their new fellow students within the room seem eerily familiar. The class made their appearance in the premiere episode of the second season,Girl Meets Gravity. characters.name: Amy Matthews
characters.description: Amy MatthewsFull nameAmanda MatthewsNickname(s)Boom-Boom (by Alan)Shavaughn (by Alan)Ma (by Eric, Cory & Josh)GenderFemaleDate of birthc. 1953Age60sResides inCedar Heights, Philadelphia, PennsylvaniaOccupationReal Estate Agent (formerly)Art Gallery Worker (formerly)Student (formerly)HousewifeEye colorBrownHair colorBrownFamilyNana Boo Boo (mother)Grandpa Poppy (father; deceased)Eric Matthews(eldest son)Cory Matthews(son)Morgan Matthews(daughter)Joshua Matthews(youngest son)Topanga Lawrence-Matthews(daughter-in-law)Riley Matthews(granddaughter)August Matthews(grandson)Bernice Matthews (mother-in-law)Grandpa Matthews (father-in-law)Unnamed sister-in-lawRomancesAlan Matthews(husband)Mark Braithwaite (ex-boyfriend)FriendsGeorge FeenySchoolPennbrook University (briefly)First seenPilot(BMW)Girl Meets Home for the Holidays(GMW)Last seenBrave New World (Part 2)(BMW)Girl Meets Goodbye(GMW)Portrayed byBetsy Randle Amanda "Amy" Matthewswas a character inGirl Meets World. Amy was also a character inBoy Meets World. Amy is portrayed byBetsy Randle. Amy is the quintessential mother-in-law and mother, with a slightly sarcastic demeanor, especially when the men in her life are oblivious to facts. She is affectionate, but also tough.

characters.name: Anastasia Boulangerie
characters.description: Anastasia BoulangerieFull nameAnastasia BoulangerieNickname(s)Bobbie Jo Thibodeaux (birth name)GenderFemaleDate of birthc.1980sAge30sResides inHollywood, CaliforniaPossum Trot, Arkansas (hometown)OccupationActressEye colorBrownHair colorBrownFriendsKaty Hart(childhood best friend)AffiliationsScreen Actors GuildArmstrong FilmsSeason(s)3Seen inGirl Meets HollyworldPortrayed byStephanie Lemelin Anastasia Boulangerie(bornBobbie Jo Thibodeauxin Possum Trot, Arkansas), was a famous actress who appeared in "Girl Meets Hollyworld".She was played byStephanie Lemelin. During her childhood, she was best friends with fellow aspiring actressKaty Clutterbucket, and the two promised one another that if one became rich and famous, they would not forget about the other. However, after changing her name to Anastasia Boulangerie and masquerading as a native Parisian, Anastasia became famous and left Arkansas, severing her friendship with Katy.

During her childhood, she was best friends with fellow aspiring actressKaty Clutterbucket, and the two promised one another that if one became rich and famous, they would not forget about the other. However, after changing her name to Anastasia Boulangerie and masquerading as a native Parisian, Anastasia became famous and left Arkansas, severing her friendship with Katy.

characters.name: Angela Moore
characters.description: Angela MooreFull nameAngela MooreGenderFemaleDate of birth1980Age35-36Resides inPennsylvania, Philadephia (BMW)Eye colorBrownHair colorBlack/Dyed Ombre BlondeFamilyAlvin Moore(father; deceased)Unnamed motherRomancesShawn Hunter(ex-boyfriend)Unnamed husbandFriendsTopanga LawrenceRachel McGuireCory MatthewsJack HunterEric MatthewsSchoolJohn Adams High SchoolPennbrook UniversitySeason(s)2First seenBoy Meets Real World(BMW)Last seenAngela's Ashes(BMW)Seen inGirl Meets HurricanePortrayed byTrina McGee Angela Mooreis a recurring character inGirl Meets World. She was a regular character in the final seasons ofBoy Meets World. She wasShawn's first serious girlfriend andTopanga's closest high school female friend, along with some others. Angela was portrayed as practical, sentimental, intelligent and compassionate. She was shown to look at problems in a well thought out point of view and usually tried to keep her own emotions aside, something she evidently learned from her father, whom she's very close to. She was shown to have a witty, teasing and sarcastic sense of humor and was one of the more mature members of the group of friends, at times more mature than Topanga. She was also shown to be a greatly supportive person and often strived to make her friends meet their full potential. Angela was often passionate about people and was shown to have an affinity for the arts, especially poetry. Angela was portrayed as practical, sentimental, intelligent and compassionate. She was shown to look at problems in a well thought out point of view and usually tried to keep her own emotions aside, something she evidently learned from her father, whom she's very close to. She was shown to have a witty, teasing and sarcastic sense of humor and was one of the more mature members of the group of friends, at times more mature than Topanga. She was also shown to be a greatly supportive person and often strived to make her friends meet their full potential. Angela was often passionate about people and was shown to have an affinity for the arts, especially poetry.

characters.name: Austin and Ally
characters.description: Austin and AllyCharacters shippedAustin MoonAlly DawsonStatusBest FriendsMarriedPortrayed byRoss LynchLaura Marano "Austin and Ally" is the romantic relationship pairing of Austin Moon and Ally Dawson, who both guest starred in "Girl Meets World: Of Terror 2", theseason 2Halloween episode ofGirl Meets World. They are primarily known as the titular characters of their own popular Disney Channel series,Austin & Ally,which ran for four seasons.They were played byLaura MaranoandRoss Lynch. AsRiley and Maya, wearing matching Flapper Girl "Jazz Baby" outfits representative of the 1920's, attempt to convince theMatthewsthat they can manage without adult supervision at the Haunted House attraction of the Halloween Central Park Spooktacular, they call out to a passing costumed couple, dressed as a Bacon Strip and a Tomato Slice, for collaborative confirmation. The slightly older teens agree that it is a safe environment.Avarecognizes the Bacon Strip as Austin Moon, and handing her camera to the Tomato Slice, the miniature Wicked Witch of the West, has the celebrated teen pop idol lift her into his arms.Auggie, garbed as the Scarecrow of Oz, correctly identifies the older girl as Ally Dawson, a popular music star in her own right. This fails to impress Ava, as she merely instructs Ally to take the pictures. Ally is bemused, as Ava flirts with her boyfriend, Austin, stating that she can appreciate a girl that knows what she wants. However, when Austin states that he lives in Florida, Ava ends their nascent relationship, but does return his wallet.  Ally assures the Matthews that she and Austin would be happy to spend time with the pair of Jazz Babies.  This seems to placate Riley's parents, whom at their daughter's request, do not impose a curfew.  However, Riley suggests ten as an appropriate time to her new friends, and is surprised to learn that is when the Monster Parade actually starts.  After the Matthews have left to take Auggie and his friends Trick-or-Treating, the girls tell Ally and Austin that they should not feel obligated to stay with them as their friends,Lucas and Farkle, should be along soon.  However, no one seems to notice that Larry, the security guard assigned to the Haunted House, abruptly morphs into ayoung woman clad in a white Flapper Girl dress.  As the girls scream when the approaching figure greets them,  Austin notes that if they are frightened by that, the pair may not be ready to handle the Haunted House.  Riley and Maya reveal that the recent arrival is actually a ghost, even as the newcomer asks the girls to take her home because she is scared. When Riley asks what is wrong, the girl in white explains it is the choice of the Haunted House. Ally asks if that means the place doesn't look authentic, but the enigmatic female flatly states that the house is truly haunted, as she knows the ghost that dwells there. Despite Riley and Maya's insistence that that they are correct in their claim, both Austin and Ally are dubious of the

characters.name: Ava Morgenstern
characters.description: Ava MorgensternFull nameAva Melanie Ruth Esther MorgensternNickname(s)Freako Morgenstern (Riley)Ursula (Topanga)GenderFemaleDate of birthc. 2008Age6 (season 1)7 (season 2)8 (season 3)Resides inNew York CityEye colorBlueHair colorBlondeFamilyJudy Morgenstern(mother)Mr. Morgenstern (father)RomancesAuggie Matthews(boyfriend/"husband")FriendsAuggie MatthewsDeweyRaffiTopanga MatthewsEnemiesEmma WeathersbySeason(s)1,2,3First seenGirl Meets Sneak AttackLast seenGirl Meets GoodbyePortrayed byAva Kolker Ava Melanie Ruth Esther Morgensternis a recurring character inGirl Meets World. Ava isAuggie's eight-year-old, manipulative girlfriend. She convinces Auggie to do whatever she asks because she is older. However, Ava is ultimately oblivious to how this affects Auggie. She is portrayed byAva Kolker. Ava is the girlfriend/"wife" ofAuggie Matthews. They get "married" in"Girl Meets First Date."Topanga initially disliked Ava, but is slowly warming up to her as seen in "Girl Meets High School (Part 1)" as a mother figure. At times Ava can be rather rude towards those around her, including her crush Auggie. In "Girl Meets Sneak Attack," she states how she likes that Auggie will do whatever she wants because she is a year older (she is six and he is five). If she sees something she wants, she attempts to get it, as evidenced by when she saw Auggie's stuffed toy, Mr. Googly, and once tried to steal him. She often introduces herself by singing her name.
characters.personality_section: At times Ava can be rather rude towards those around her, including her crush Auggie. If she sees something she wants, she attempts to get it, as evidenced by when she saw Auggie's stuffed toy, Mr. Googly, and once tried to steal him. She often introduces herself by singing her name.

characters.name: Ava Morgenstern
characters.description: Ava MorgensternFull nameAva Melanie Ruth Esther MorgensternNickname(s)Freako Morgenstern (Riley)Ursula (Topanga)GenderFemaleDate of birthc. 2008Age6 (season 1)7 (season 2)8 (season 3)Resides inNew York CityEye colorBlueHair colorBlondeFamilyJudy Morgenstern(mother)Mr. Morgenstern (father)RomancesAuggie Matthews(boyfriend/"husband")FriendsAuggie MatthewsDeweyRaffiTopanga MatthewsEnemiesEmma WeathersbySeason(s)1,2,3First seenGirl Meets Sneak AttackLast seenGirl Meets GoodbyePortrayed byAva Kolker Ava Melanie Ruth Esther Morgensternis a recurring character inGirl Meets World. Ava isAuggie's eight-year-old, manipulative girlfriend. She convinces Auggie to do whatever she asks because she is older. However, Ava is ultimately oblivious to how this affects Auggie. She is portrayed byAva Kolker. Ava is the girlfriend/"wife" ofAuggie Matthews. They get "married" in"Girl Meets First Date."Topanga initially disliked Ava, but is slowly warming up to her as seen in "Girl Meets High School (Part 1)" as a mother figure. At times Ava can be rather rude towards those around her, including her crush Auggie. In "Girl Meets Sneak Attack," she states how she likes that Auggie will do whatever she wants because she is a year older (she is six and he is five). If she sees something she wants, she attempts to get it, as evidenced by when she saw Auggie's stuffed toy, Mr. Googly, and once tried to steal him. She often introduces herself by singing her name.

characters.name: Barry The Bear
characters.description: Barry The BearFull nameBarry The BearNickname(s)Barry the Bear-Bear (by Riley and Josh)GenderMaleOccupationTeddy Bear toRiley MatthewsEye colorBlackHair colorBrown (fur)FriendsRiley Matthews(owner)VioletEnemiesAuggie Matthews(bit off face)Season(s)2,3First seenGirl Meets the Forgiveness ProjectLast seenWorld Meets Girl Barry The Bearwas a stuffed teddy bear owned byRiley Matthews. She continued to cherish him even after her little brother,Auggie, bit his face off in a fit of childish jealous rage. Riley considers Barry a source of joy, comfort, security, and love, as well as the symbol of her childhood. Riley Meets Barry

characters.name: Billy Ross
characters.description: Billy RossFull nameBilly RossGenderMaleDate of birth2000-01Age13-14 (Season 1)Resides inNew York CityOccupationStudentEye colorBrownHair colorBlackFriendsLucas FriarEnemiesFarkle Minkus(formerly)Darby Walker(possibly)SchoolJohn Quincy Adams Middle SchoolSeason(s)1Seen inGirl Meets FlawsPortrayed byZachary Mitchell Billy Rosswas a character inGirl Meets World, making his only appearance in "Girl Meets Flaws." He was portrayed byZachary Mitchell. Billy can be first seen as a proud and confident person, but later revealed to be the one who bulliedFarkle Minkus. He is confident today that he didn't have a flaw at first, but later knew and warmed up. He eventually became friends with Riley, Maya, and Farkle after he became nice.

characters.name: Carla
characters.description: CarlaFull nameCarlaGenderFemaleResides inNew York CityOccupationStudentEye colorBrownHair colorBrownFriendsReneeMaya Hart(formerly)EnemiesMaya HartSeason(s)3Seen inGirl Meets True MayaPortrayed byMia XitlaliCarla, along with her friend, Renee, discover their old acquaintance, Maya Hart, all alone in Christopher Park. Upon confirming Maya's identity, Carla jokingly demands Maya's jacket. The pair notice the stuff Maya has brought with her and assume she has returned to her old stomping grounds to do some damage. However, the pair state that Maya has grown soft, and urge her to prove them wrong. Yet Maya ultimately refuses, and momentarily catching Carla in a headlock, announces that she knows exactly who she is and what she is going to do. Wielding a hammer in one hand, and a brick in the other, Maya swings them over her head and rushes at Carla and Renee, causing the pair to flee.She was played byMia Xitlali.

characters.name: Characters At Alternate Ages
characters.description: Characters At Alternate Ages Characters At Alternate Agesare the instances inGirl Meets Worldwhen the storyline dictates the depiction of regular characters of the series at varying points in their lives, requiring the use of different performers.

characters.name: Characters At Alternate Ages
characters.description: Characters At Alternate Ages Characters At Alternate Agesare the instances inGirl Meets Worldwhen the storyline dictates the depiction of regular characters of the series at varying points in their lives, requiring the use of different performers.

characters.name: Charlie Gardner
characters.description: Charlie GardnerFull nameCharlie GardnerGenderMaleDate of birthc. 2001Age14(Season 2)Resides inNew York City, New YorkOccupation8th Grade Student atJohn Quincy Adams Middle SchoolEye colorGreenHair colorBrownFamilyUnnamed motherUnnamed sistersRomancesRiley Matthews(crush; went out on a date)FriendsRiley MatthewsLucas FriarEnemiesLucas Friar(former romantic rival)SchoolJohn Quincy Adams Middle School(formerly)Season(s)2First seenGirl Meets Semi-FormalLast seenGirl Meets the New YearPortrayed byTanner Buchanan Charlie Gardnerwas a recurring character in thesecond seasonofGirl Meets World. He first appeared inGirl Meets Semi-Formal, and is portrayed byTanner Buchanan. Charlie is an eighth grader atJohn Quincy Adams Middle Schoolwho admires Riley very much. When the semi formal approaches, he finally summoned the courage to ask Riley to the dance. He returned inGirl Meets Texas (Part 3)and askedRileyout on a date, which she accepted. InGirl Meets the New Year, Charlie invites himself to Riley's New Years Eve Party. He immediately gloats to Lucas about how he was invited first. He plays the couples game with Riley, and proves that he knows quite a bit about her. Charlie asks Riley if he can stand next to her, since legend has it: If you stand next to someone at midnight on New Years, you'll spend the rest of the year with that person. Riley tells Charlie that "knowing facts isn't enough, there need to be something more". Charlie spends midnight, with Riley's brother Auggie. Auggie tells Charlie that it will be his first time staying up until midnight. One second before the midnight Auggie falls asleep on Charlie's shoulder. After Farkle spills RIley's secret, Charlie runs out and carries Auggie over his shoulder. Charlie Gardner is a quiet, shy boy that sits in the back of the class. He is respected by Cory Matthews and has a crush on Riley Matthews. He is also a hopeless romantic. He goes out of his way to prove that he is perfect for Riley. He is also referred to as adorable, and every time he is around Maya she says "Cheese Souffle".

Chet is Shawn's deceased father. Chet is portrayed by Blake Clark.

characters.name: Coach Gleason
characters.description: Coach GleasonFull nameMr. GleasonNickname(s)CoachGenderMaleResides inNew York CityOccupationGym TeacherEye colorBrownHair colorBlackAffiliationsJohn Quincy Adams Middle SchoolSeason(s)1Seen inGirl Meets World: Of TerrorPortrayed byMichael D. Roberts Coach Gleasonis a character inGirl Meets World. He was theJohn Quincy Adams Middle SchoolPE teacher forRiley,Maya,Farkle,Lucas, andSarah. The Coach displays a gruff, no-nonsense, yet slightly sarcastic attitude.  He is also not overly blessed with much discretion or tact, and exhibits a  very loud speaking voice.  While not initially sympathetic to Farkle's misgivings, he does encourage his nervous student to confront them, and appears gratified when Farkle does manage to overcome his fears. Coach Gleason does apparently seem to have some dissatisfaction with his job, and may have unfulfilled dreams of becoming a ballet dancer. characters.description: Cory MatthewsSeason 3Season 2Season 1Full nameCornelius A. MatthewsNickname(s)Cor, CoryCorrence (byShawn; once)Cora (by himself; as a woman)Johnny Baboon, Mr. Anal-Compulsive (byHarley)The CoryShawn HunterInsignificant Speck (by Eric)Risk Boy, Accomplice Boy, Lid Boy, Danger Boy (by himself)Odysseus (by Jonathan Turner)The Amazing LiplessCurly, Fuzzy, Corky, Corky-DorkyBrillo-Head. Sheep HeadGomezMr. LuckyCappuccino Boy (by Mr. Fontaine)WalterDon Francisco (by himself)Harold PetermanHambone (by Farkle)Coy (himself; once)Pops (by Riley)GenderMaleDate of birth1980(retcon)1982(originally)Age34-35(season 1)35-36(season 2)36-37(season 3)Resides inNew York City, New York, United StatesOccupationHistory TeacherCo-Owner ofTopanga'sGopher for the Italian Mob (formerly)Magazine Salesman (briefly)Eye colorBrownHair colorBrownFamilyAlan Matthews(father)Amy Matthews(mother)Eric Matthews(older brother)Morgan Matthews(sister)Joshua Matthews(younger brother)Riley Matthews(daughter)August Matthews(son)Grandpa Matthews (paternal grandfather)Bernice Matthews(paternal grandmother)Unnamed paternal auntGrandpa Poppy(maternal grandfather; deceased)Nana Boo Boo(maternal grandmother)Jedidiah Lawrence(father-in-law)Rhiannon Lawrence(mother-in-law)Prudence Curtis(aunt-in-law)Rosie McGee(grandmother-in-law)RomancesTopanga Matthews(wife)(on Boy Meets World - )Linda (first girlfriend)Wendy Jansen(ex-girlfriend)Theresa Keiner(ex-girlfriend/dated)Missy Robinson (kissed by)Lauren(kissed)Angela Moore(platonic kiss)Few other ex-girlfriends/datesFriendsShawn Hunter(best friend)Stuart MinkusJack HunterRachel McGuireHarley KeinerJennifer Bassett MinkusHarper BurgessEnemies(formerly; BMW)Jennifer BassettHarley KeinerJoseph "Joey the Rat" EpsteinFrankie StecchinoSchoolJefferson ElementaryJohn Adams HighPennbrook UniversityAffiliationsThe ExitsJohn Adams High Wrestling TeamJohn Quincy Adams Middle School(formerly)Abigail Adams High SchoolSeason(s)1,2,3First seenPilot(BMW)Girl Meets World(GMW)Last seenBrave New World(BMW)Girl Meets Goodbye(GMW)Portrayed byBen SavageCory Padnos (younger self; flashback) Cornelius "Cory" A. Matthewsis the deuteragonist onGirl Meets World. Cory is the father ofRileyandAuggie, and is the husband ofTopanga. He is a history teacher atAbigail Adams High School, and he teaches Riley,Maya Hart,Farkle Minkus,Lucas Friar,Zay BabineauxandIsadora Smackle. Cory was the protagonist and title character inBoy Meets World. Cory is portrayed byBen Savage. As inBoy Meets World, Cory is quirky, witty and occasionally high-strung, and while he remains a loving husband to his wife Topanga, he has become an excellent father for his two children, Riley and Auggie. In the interim between the two series, Cory has become an exceptional teacher and life coach, particularly toMaya, who due to her rough childhood was initially not one of his better students but improves significantly by the series' end; Maya has proclaimed on multiple occasions that Cory is "the best teacher there is"

characters.name: Dave
characters.description: DaveFull nameDaveGenderMaleAge14Resides inNew York CityOccupationStudentEye colorBrownHair colorBrownSchoolJohn Quincy Adams Middle SchoolAbigail Adams High SchoolAffiliationsJQA Chemistry ClubSeason(s)1,2,3First seenGirl Meets FatherLast seenGirl Meets GoodbyePortrayed byHunter Wickham Daveis a background student character inGirl Meets World. He is played by Hunter Wickham. An extremely quiet student, he seems to be good friends withYogi. He usually sits in the back rows ofMr. Matthews' History class.Along with the rest of his JQA classmates, he attendsAbigail Adams High School.
